title: Doc Capture - Intelligent Extraction
tagline: Automated data extraction from identity documents and complex invoices using LLMs
problem: Manual data entry from varied document types (Aadhaar, PAN, Invoices) was slow and prone to errors.
solution: Built a FastAPI backend using Groq LLM and PyMuPDF to extract structured JSON/Excel data from multi-type documents with template mapping.

architecture.security: AES-256 Encryption at Rest + JWT Auth

decisions.rationale: Used Redis for task queuing to handle high-concurrency document uploads without blocking the API.
